  1172	# Return the next sequential KB entry ID (KB-001, KB-002, ...) by reading orchestrations/agents/KB.md
  1173	get_next_kb_id() {
  1174	    local kb_file="$AUTOMATION_DIR/agents/KB.md"
  1175	    if [ ! -f "$kb_file" ]; then
  1176	        echo "KB-001"
  1177	        return
  1178	    fi
  1179	    local last_num
  1180	    last_num=$(grep -oP '(?<=^## KB-)\d+' "$kb_file" | sort -n | tail -1)
  1181	    if [ -z "$last_num" ]; then
  1182	        echo "KB-001"
  1183	    else
  1184	        printf "KB-%03d" $((last_num + 1))
  1185	    fi

570	        echo "high"
   571	    fi
   572	}
   573	
   574	resolve_story_runtime_settings() {
   575	    local story_id="$1"
   576	    local phase_id="$2"
   577	    local runtime_json provider story_model phase_model project_model resolved_model model_source allowed_models effort_hint
   578	
   579	    runtime_json=$(jq -c --arg id "$story_id" --arg phase "$phase_id" '
   580	        (.configuration.aiRuntime // {}) as $runtime |
   581	        (.phasesConfig[$phase] // {}) as $phase_cfg |
   582	        (.stories[] | select(.id == $id)) as $story |
   583	        {
   584	            provider: ($story.aiProvider // $phase_cfg.aiProvider // $runtime.provider // "epam"),
   585	            storyModel: ($story.model // ""),
   586	            phaseDefaultModel: ($phase_cfg.defaultModel // ""),
   587	            projectDefaultModel: ($runtime.defaultModel // ""),
   588	            allowedModels: ($runtime.allowedModels // []),
   589	            effort: ($story.effort // "")
   590	        }' "$PRD_FILE" 2>/dev/null)
   591	
   592	    if [ -z "$runtime_json" ] || [ "$runtime_json" = "null" ]; then
   593	        error "Failed to resolve runtime metadata for $story_id"
   594	        exit 1
   595	    fi
   596	
   597	    provider=$(echo "$runtime_json" | jq -r '.provider')
   598	    story_model=$(echo "$runtime_json" | jq -r '.storyModel')
   599	    phase_model=$(echo "$runtime_json" | jq -r '.phaseDefaultModel')
   600	    project_model=$(echo "$runtime_json" | jq -r '.projectDefaultModel')
   601	    allowed_models=$(echo "$runtime_json" | jq -r '.allowedModels[]?' 2>/dev/null || true)
   602	    effort_hint=$(echo "$runtime_json" | jq -r '.effort')
   603	
   604	    if [ -n "$story_model" ]; then
   605	        resolved_model="$story_model"
   606	        model_source="story"
   607	    elif [ "$provider" = "epam" ] && [ -n "$phase_model" ]; then
   608	        resolved_model="$phase_model"
   609	        model_source="phase"
   610	    elif [ "$provider" = "epam" ] && [ -n "$project_model" ]; then
   611	        resolved_model="$project_model"
   612	        model_source="project"
   613	    else
   614	        case "${effort_hint:-medium}" in
   615	            low) resolved_model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ;;
   616	            high) resolved_model="claude-opus-4-6" ;;
   617	            *) resolved_model="claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929" ;;
   618	        esac
   619	        model_source="legacy-effort"
   620	    fi
   621	
   622	    if [ "$provider" = "epam" ]; then
   623	        if [ -z "$resolved_model" ]; then
   624	            error "Missing model for $story_id. Resolution order is story.model -> phasesConfig[$phase_id].defaultModel -> configuration.aiRuntime.defaultModel."
   625	            exit 1
   626	        fi
   627	        if ! echo "$allowed_models" | grep -Fxq "$resolved_model"; then
   628	            error "Invalid model for $story_id: '$resolved_model'. Allowed models: $(echo "$allowed_models" | paste -sd ', ' -)"
   629	            exit 1
   630	        fi
   631	    fi
   632	
   633	    printf '%s|%s|%s\n' "$provider" "$resolved_model" "$model_source"
   634	}
   635	
   636	model_to_pricing_tier() {
   637	    local model="$1"
   638	    local fallback="$2"
   639	
   640	    case "$model" in
   641	        *haiku*) echo "low" ;;
   642	        *opus*) echo "high" ;;
   643	        *sonnet*) echo "medium" ;;
   644	        *)
   645	            case "$fallback" in
   646	                low|medium|high) echo "$fallback" ;;
   647	                *) echo "medium" ;;
   648	            esac
   649	            ;;
   650	    esac
   651	}
   652	
   653	# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   654	# Build phase position map
   655	# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   656	declare -A STORY_PHASE
   657	declare -A STORY_POSITION
   658	
   659	all_phases=$(jq -r '.implementationOrder | keys[]' "$PRD_FILE")
   660	while IFS= read -r phase; do
   661	    pos=1
   662	    phase_story_ids=$(jq -r --arg p "$phase" '.implementationOrder[$p][]' "$PRD_FILE")
   663	    while IFS= read -r sid; do
   664	        STORY_PHASE["$sid"]="$phase"
   665	        STORY_POSITION["$sid"]=$pos
   666	        pos=$((pos + 1))
   667	    done <<< "$phase_story_ids"
   668	done <<< "$all_phases"
   669	
   670	# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   671	# Estimation Loop
   672	# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   673	log "Computing estimates..."
   674	echo ""
   675	
   676	# Accumulators for summary
   677	declare -A PHASE_STORIES PHASE_MINUTES PHASE_TOKENS PHASE_COST
   678	GRAND_STORIES=0
   679	GRAND_MINUTES=0
   680	GRAND_TOKENS=0
   681	GRAND_COST=0
   682	
   683	# JSON accumulator
   684	JSON_RESULTS="[]"
   685	
   686	# Track previous agent role and files per phase for cache bonuses
   687	declare -A PREV_ROLE_IN_PHASE
   688	declare -A PREV_FILES_IN_PHASE
   689	
   690	while IFS= read -r sid; do
   691	    # Extract story metadata via single jq call
   692	    story_data=$(jq -r --arg id "$sid" '
   693	        .stories[] | select(.id == $id) |
   694	        "\(.id)|\(.title)|\(.humanHours // .estimatedHours // 0)|\(.priority // "medium")|\(.storyType // "implementation")|\(.agentRole // "none")|\(.dependencies | length)|\(.technicalNotes.requiredSkills | length)|\(.technicalNotes.files | length)|\(.technicalNotes.requiredSkills | join(","))"
   695	    ' "$PRD_FILE")
   696	
   697	    IFS='|' read -r s_id s_title s_hours s_priority s_type s_role s_deps s_skills s_files s_skill_csv <<< "$story_data"
   698	
   699	    # Effort tier
   700	    effort=$(get_effort_tier "$s_hours")
   701	
   702	    # Phase and position
   703	    phase="${STORY_PHASE[$sid]:-unknown}"
   704	    position="${STORY_POSITION[$sid]:-1}"
   705	    runtime_data=$(resolve_story_runtime_settings "$sid" "$phase")
   706	    IFS='|' read -r resolved_provider resolved_model resolved_model_source <<< "$runtime_data"
   707	
   708	    # Codebase LOC
   709	    loc_data=$(compute_loc "$sid")
   710	    IFS='|' read -r total_loc import_count <<< "$loc_data"
   711	
   712	    # Complexity index
   713	    C=$(compute_complexity "$s_priority" "$s_type" "$s_deps" "$s_skills" "$s_files" "$total_loc" "$s_skill_csv")
   714	
   715	    # Per-tier human-to-AI ratio
   716	    local_h2a=0
   717	    case "$effort" in
   718	        low)    local_h2a=$HUMAN_TO_AI_RATIO_LOW ;;
   719	        medium) local_h2a=$HUMAN_TO_AI_RATIO_MED ;;
   720	        high)   local_h2a=$HUMAN_TO_AI_RATIO_HIGH ;;
   721	    esac
   722	
   723	    # Step 1: Compute "complexity minutes" using H2A ratio — a measure of work,
   724	    # not wall-clock time. This is the same regardless of execution mode.
   725	    complexity_minutes=$(echo "scale=4; $s_hours * $local_h2a * 60 * $C" | bc)
   726	    [[ "$complexity_minutes" =~ ^\. ]] && complexity_minutes="0${complexity_minutes}"
   727	
   728	    # Step 2: Derive turn count from complexity using INTERACTIVE rates (conceptual steps)
   729	    local_interactive_mpt=0
   730	    case "$effort" in
   731	        low)    local_interactive_mpt=$INTERACTIVE_MPT_LOW ;;
   732	        medium) local_interactive_mpt=$INTERACTIVE_MPT_MED ;;
   733	        high)   local_interactive_mpt=$INTERACTIVE_MPT_HIGH ;;
   734	    esac
   735	
   736	    if (( $(echo "$local_interactive_mpt > 0" | bc -l) )); then
   737	        turns_raw=$(echo "scale=4; $complexity_minutes / $local_interactive_mpt * $AUTONOMOUS_TURN_MULTIPLIER" | bc)
   738	    else
   739	        turns_raw="1"
   740	    fi
   741	    turns=$(ceil_val "$turns_raw")
   742	    if [ "$turns" -lt 1 ]; then
   743	        turns=1
   744	    fi
   745	
   746	    # Step 3: Compute actual AI execution minutes = turns * execution-mode rate
   747	    local_tpm=0
   748	    local_mpt=0
   749	    case "$effort" in
   750	        low)    local_tpm=$TOKENS_PER_MIN_LOW;  local_mpt=$MIN_PER_TURN_LOW ;;
   751	        medium) local_tpm=$TOKENS_PER_MIN_MED;  local_mpt=$MIN_PER_TURN_MED ;;
   752	        high)   local_tpm=$TOKENS_PER_MIN_HIGH; local_mpt=$MIN_PER_TURN_HIGH ;;
   753	    esac
   754	
   755	    ai_minutes=$(echo "scale=2; $turns * $local_mpt" | bc)
   756	    [[ "$ai_minutes" =~ ^\. ]] && ai_minutes="0${ai_minutes}"
   757	    if (( $(echo "$ai_minutes < $AI_MINUTES_FLOOR" | bc -l) )); then
   758	        ai_minutes="$AI_MINUTES_FLOOR"
   759	    fi
   760	
   761	    file_token_factor=$(echo "scale=4; 1 + 0.1 * $(max_zero $((s_files - 1)))" | bc)
   762	
   763	    # Context accumulation: each turn replays growing history, so token use is
   764	    # super-linear in turns. ln(turns) captures this without runaway growth.
   765	    # 1 turn → 1.00x, 10 turns → 1.28x, 30 turns → 1.41x, 60 turns → 1.49x.
   766	    if [ "$turns" -gt 1 ]; then
   767	        ctx_growth=$(echo "scale=4; 1 + 0.12 * l($turns)" | bc -l)
   768	    else
   769	        ctx_growth="1.0000"
   770	    fi
   771	
   772	    tokens=$(echo "scale=0; ($ai_minutes * $local_tpm * $file_token_factor * $ctx_growth) / 1" | bc)
   773	
   774	    # Cache ratio: position-based + same-role bonus + file-overlap bonus
   775	    cache_ratio=$(get_cache_ratio "$position")
   776	
   777	    # Same-role bonus
   778	    prev_role="${PREV_ROLE_IN_PHASE[$phase]:-}"
   779	    if [ -n "$prev_role" ] && [ "$prev_role" = "$s_role" ]; then
   780	        cache_ratio=$(echo "scale=2; $cache_ratio + $CACHE_SAME_ROLE_BONUS" | bc)
   781	    fi
   782	
   783	    # File-overlap bonus: shared files with previous story increase cache hits
   784	    current_files=$(jq -r --arg id "$sid" \
   785	        '.stories[] | select(.id==$id) | .technicalNotes.files // [] | .[]' "$PRD_FILE" 2>/dev/null | sort)
   786	    prev_files_str="${PREV_FILES_IN_PHASE[$phase]:-}"
   787	    if [ -n "$prev_files_str" ] && [ -n "$current_files" ]; then
   788	        prev_files_sorted=$(echo "$prev_files_str" | tr ',' '\n' | sort)
   789	        overlap_count=$(comm -12 <(echo "$current_files") <(echo "$prev_files_sorted") | wc -l)
   790	        current_count=$(echo "$current_files" | wc -l)
   791	        if [ "$current_count" -gt 0 ] && [ "$overlap_count" -gt 0 ]; then
   792	            overlap_pct=$(echo "scale=2; $overlap_count / $current_count" | bc)
   793	            if (( $(echo "$overlap_pct > 0.50" | bc -l) )); then
   794	                cache_ratio=$(echo "scale=2; $cache_ratio + 0.15" | bc)
   795	            elif (( $(echo "$overlap_pct > 0" | bc -l) )); then
   796	                cache_ratio=$(echo "scale=2; $cache_ratio + 0.08" | bc)
   797	            fi
   798	        fi
   799	    fi
   800	
   801	    # Cap at 0.85
   802	    if (( $(echo "$cache_ratio > 0.85" | bc -l) )); then
   803	        cache_ratio=0.85
   804	    fi
   805	
   806	    PREV_ROLE_IN_PHASE["$phase"]="$s_role"
   807	    PREV_FILES_IN_PHASE["$phase"]="$(echo "$current_files" | tr '\n' ',')"
   808	
   809	    # Per-storyType IO split (default to implementation if unknown)
   810	    local_input_ratio="${INPUT_RATIO[$s_type]:-0.75}"
   811	    local_output_ratio="${OUTPUT_RATIO[$s_type]:-0.25}"
   812	
   813	    input_tokens=$(echo "scale=0; ($tokens * $local_input_ratio) / 1" | bc)
   814	    output_tokens=$(echo "scale=0; ($tokens * $local_output_ratio) / 1" | bc)
   815	    cache_tokens=$(echo "scale=0; ($input_tokens * $cache_ratio) / 1" | bc)
   816	    uncached_input=$(echo "scale=0; ($input_tokens - $cache_tokens) / 1" | bc)
   817	
   818	    pricing_tier=$(model_to_pricing_tier "$resolved_model" "$effort")
   819	    price_input="${PRICING_INPUT[$pricing_tier]}"
   820	    price_cached="${PRICING_CACHED[$pricing_tier]}"
   821	    price_output="${PRICING_OUTPUT[$pricing_tier]}"
   822	
   823	    cost=$(echo "scale=4; ($uncached_input / 1000000) * $price_input + ($cache_tokens / 1000000) * $price_cached + ($output_tokens / 1000000) * $price_output" | bc)
   824	
   825	    # Cache priming surcharge for the first story in a phase
   826	    if [ "$position" -eq 1 ]; then
   827	        cost=$(echo "scale=4; $cost + $CACHE_PRIMING_COST" | bc)
   828	    fi
   829	
   830	    # Format cost to 2 decimals
   831	    cost=$(echo "scale=2; $cost / 1" | bc)
   832	    # Ensure leading zero
   833	    if echo "$cost" | grep -q '^\.' ; then
   834	        cost="0$cost"
   835	    fi
   836	
   837	    # Uncertainty ranges: wider for higher complexity and more turns
   838	    # range_factor scales from 0.15 (simple) to 0.45 (complex)
   839	    range_factor=$(echo "scale=4; 0.15 + 0.03 * l($C * $turns + 1)" | bc -l)
   840	    if (( $(echo "$range_factor > 0.50" | bc -l) )); then range_factor="0.50"; fi
   841	    est_min_low=$(echo "scale=2; $ai_minutes * (1 - $range_factor)" | bc)
   842	    est_min_high=$(echo "scale=2; $ai_minutes * (1 + $range_factor * 1.5)" | bc)
   843	    est_cost_low=$(echo "scale=2; $cost * (1 - $range_factor)" | bc)
   844	    est_cost_high=$(echo "scale=2; $cost * (1 + $range_factor * 1.5)" | bc)
   845	    [[ "$est_min_low" =~ ^\. ]] && est_min_low="0${est_min_low}"
   846	    [[ "$est_min_high" =~ ^\. ]] && est_min_high="0${est_min_high}"
   847	    [[ "$est_cost_low" =~ ^\. ]] && est_cost_low="0${est_cost_low}"
   848	    [[ "$est_cost_high" =~ ^\. ]] && est_cost_high="0${est_cost_high}"
   849	    [[ "$est_min_low" =~ ^- ]] && est_min_low="0.00"
   850	    [[ "$est_cost_low" =~ ^- ]] && est_cost_low="0.00"
   851	
   852	    # Format ai_minutes to 1 decimal
   853	    ai_minutes_fmt=$(printf "%.1f" "$ai_minutes")
   854	
   855	    # Comma-format tokens
   856	    tokens_fmt=$(printf "%'d" "$tokens" 2>/dev/null || echo "$tokens")
   857	    input_fmt=$(printf "%'d" "$input_tokens" 2>/dev/null || echo "$input_tokens")
   858	    output_fmt=$(printf "%'d" "$output_tokens" 2>/dev/null || echo "$output_tokens")
   859	
   860	    # Cache percentage
   861	    cache_pct=$(echo "scale=0; ($cache_ratio * 100) / 1" | bc)
   862	
   863	    # Print formatted output
   864	    if [ "$JSON_MODE" != true ]; then
   865	        echo -e "${BOLD}${s_id}${NC}  ${s_title}"
   866	        echo "  Runtime:        ${resolved_provider} / ${resolved_model}  (${resolved_model_source})"
   867	        echo "  Human effort:   ${s_hours}h  (developer estimate)"
   868	        echo "  Machine time:   ${ai_minutes_fmt} min  (C=${C}, ratio=${local_h2a}, ${effort})"
   869	        echo "  Range:          $(printf "%.1f" "$est_min_low")–$(printf "%.1f" "$est_min_high") min  |  \$${est_cost_low}–\$${est_cost_high}"
   870	        echo "  Tokens:         ${tokens_fmt}   (in: ${input_fmt} / out: ${output_fmt}, ctx_growth: $(printf "%.2f" "$ctx_growth")x)"
   871	        echo "  Cache:          ${cache_pct}% hit   (position: ${position} in ${phase})"
   872	        echo "  Turns:          ${turns}        (${local_mpt} min/turn, ${effort} effort)"
   873	        echo "  Cost:           \$${cost}     (${pricing_tier} pricing, IO split: ${local_input_ratio}/${local_output_ratio})"
   874	        echo ""
   875	    fi
   876	
   877	    # Accumulate JSON
   878	    JSON_RESULTS=$(echo "$JSON_RESULTS" | jq \
   879	        --arg id "$s_id" \
   880	        --arg title "$s_title" \
   881	        --arg phase "$phase" \
   882	        --arg effort "$effort" \
   883	        --arg stype "$s_type" \
   884	        --arg provider "$resolved_provider" \
   885	        --arg model "$resolved_model" \
   886	        --arg model_source "$resolved_model_source" \
   887	        --argjson hours "$s_hours" \
   888	        --argjson ai_min "$ai_minutes" \
   889	        --argjson tokens "$tokens" \
   890	        --argjson turns "$turns" \
   891	        --argjson cost "$cost" \
   892	        --argjson complexity "$C" \
   893	        --argjson cache_pct "$cache_pct" \
   894	        --argjson position "$position" \
   895	        --argjson ctx_g "$ctx_growth" \
   896	        --argjson rng_min_lo "$est_min_low" \
   897	        --argjson rng_min_hi "$est_min_high" \
   898	        --argjson rng_cost_lo "$est_cost_low" \
   899	        --argjson rng_cost_hi "$est_cost_high" \
   900	        '. + [{
   901	            id: $id,
   902	            title: $title,
   903	            phase: $phase,
   904	            effort: $effort,
   905	            storyType: $stype,
   906	            resolvedProvider: $provider,
   907	            resolvedModel: $model,
   908	            resolvedModelSource: $model_source,
   909	            humanHours: $hours,
   910	            estimatedAiMinutes: ($ai_min * 100 | round / 100),
   911	            estimatedTokens: $tokens,
   912	            estimatedTurns: $turns,
   913	            estimatedCost: ($cost * 100 | round / 100),
   914	            complexityIndex: ($complexity * 10000 | round / 10000),
   915	            cacheHitPct: $cache_pct,
   916	            positionInPhase: $position,
   917	            contextGrowthFactor: ($ctx_g * 100 | round / 100),
   918	            range: {
   919	                minutesLow: ($rng_min_lo * 100 | round / 100),
   920	                minutesHigh: ($rng_min_hi * 100 | round / 100),
   921	                costLow: ($rng_cost_lo * 100 | round / 100),
   922	                costHigh: ($rng_cost_hi * 100 | round / 100)
   923	            }
   924	        }]')
   925	
   926	    # Accumulate phase totals
   927	    PHASE_STORIES["$phase"]=$(( ${PHASE_STORIES["$phase"]:-0} + 1 ))
   928	    PHASE_MINUTES["$phase"]=$(echo "scale=2; ${PHASE_MINUTES["$phase"]:-0} + $ai_minutes" | bc)
   929	    PHASE_TOKENS["$phase"]=$(echo "scale=0; ${PHASE_TOKENS["$phase"]:-0} + $tokens" | bc)
   930	    PHASE_COST["$phase"]=$(echo "scale=4; ${PHASE_COST["$phase"]:-0} + $cost" | bc)

80	        '.phasesConfig[$p].orchestrationMode // empty' \
    81	        "$PRD_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
    82	    if [ -n "$phase_mode" ] && [ "$phase_mode" != "null" ]; then
    83	        echo "$phase_mode"
    84	    else
    85	        echo "${ORCH_MODE:-bash}"
    86	    fi
    87	}
    88	
    89	resolve_story_runtime_fields() {
    90	    local story_id="$1"
    91	    local phase_id="$2"
    92	
    93	    jq -r --arg id "$story_id" --arg phase "$phase_id" '
    94	        (.configuration.aiRuntime // {}) as $runtime |
    95	        (.phasesConfig[$phase] // {}) as $phase_cfg |
    96	        (.stories[] | select(.id == $id)) as $story |
    97	        ($story.aiProvider // $phase_cfg.aiProvider // $runtime.provider // "epam") as $provider |
    98	        [
    99	            $provider,
   100	            (
   101	                if ($story.model // "") != "" then $story.model
   102	                elif $provider == "epam" then ($phase_cfg.defaultModel // $runtime.defaultModel // "")
   103	                elif ($story.effort // "medium") == "low" then "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"
   104	                elif ($story.effort // "medium") == "high" then "claude-opus-4-6"
   105	                else "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"
   106	                end
   107	            ),
   108	            (
   109	                if ($story.model // "") != "" then "story"
   110	                elif $provider == "epam" and ($phase_cfg.defaultModel // "") != "" then "phase"
   111	                elif $provider == "epam" and ($runtime.defaultModel // "") != "" then "project"
   112	                elif $provider != "epam" then "legacy-effort"
   113	                else ""
   114	                end
   115	            )
   116	        ] | join("|")' "$PRD_FILE" 2>/dev/null
   117	}
   118	
   119	# Parse arguments
   120	while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
   121	    case $1 in
   122	        --phase)
   123	            if [ -z "$2" ] || [[ "$2" == --* ]]; then
   124	                error "--phase requires a phase name"
   125	                exit 1
   126	            fi
   127	            PHASE="$2"
   128	            shift 2
   129	            ;;
   130	        --dry-run)
   131	            DRY_RUN=true
   132	            shift
   133	            ;;
   134	        --skip-cleanup)
   135	            SKIP_CLEANUP=true
   136	            shift
   137	            ;;
   138	        --mode)
   139	            if [ -z "${2:-}" ] || [[ "${2:-}" == --* ]]; then
   140	                error "--mode requires a value: bash|hybrid"
   141	                exit 1
   142	            fi
   143	            if [[ "$2" != "bash" && "$2" != "hybrid" ]]; then
   144	                error "Invalid --mode: $2 (must be 'bash' or 'hybrid')"
   145	                exit 1
   146	            fi
   147	            ORCH_MODE="$2"
   148	            shift 2
   149	            ;;
   150	        --help|-h)
   151	            cat << EOF
   152	Usage: $(basename "$0") [OPTIONS]
   153	
   154	Orchestrates parallel execution of stories using git worktrees.
   155	Runs setup stories on main, then launches primary and independent agents
   156	in parallel, waits for completion, and runs review.
   157	
   158	Options:
   159	  --phase NAME        Phase to execute (default: phase_wearables_test)
   160	  --mode MODE         Orchestration mode: bash (default) or hybrid
   161	  --dry-run           Show execution plan without running
   162	  --skip-cleanup      Don't cleanup worktrees on exit (for debugging)
   163	  --help              Show this help message
   164	
   165	Examples:
   166	  $(basename "$0")                                    # Run test phase
   167	  $(basename "$0") --phase phase11_wearable_foundation
   168	  $(basename "$0") --dry-run                          # Preview plan
   169	  $(basename "$0") --skip-cleanup                     # Keep worktrees
   170	
   171	EOF
   172	            exit 0
   173	            ;;
   174	        *)
   175	            error "Unknown option: $1"
   176	            exit 1
   177	            ;;
   178	    esac
   179	done
   180	
   181	# Verify prerequisites
   182	if [ ! -f "$CLAUDE_SH" ]; then
   183	    error "claude.sh not found at $CLAUDE_SH"
   184	    exit 1
   185	fi
   186	if [ ! -f "$PRD_FILE" ]; then
   187	    error "prd.json not found at $PRD_FILE"
   188	    exit 1
   189	fi
   190	if ! command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
   191	    error "jq is required but not installed"
   192	    exit 1
   193	fi
   194	
   195	# Verify phase exists
   196	phase_stories=$(jq -r --arg phase "$PHASE" '.implementationOrder[$phase] // empty' "$PRD_FILE")
   197	if [ -z "$phase_stories" ] || [ "$phase_stories" = "null" ]; then
   198	    error "Phase '$PHASE' not found in prd.json"
   199	    echo ""
   200	    echo "Available phases:"
   201	    jq -r '.implementationOrder | keys[]' "$PRD_FILE" | while read p; do echo "  - $p"; done
   202	    exit 1
   203	fi
   204	
   205	if ! "$SCRIPT_DIR/claude.sh" --validate-phase "$PHASE"; then
   206	    error "Phase '$PHASE' has invalid runtime provider/model metadata. Resolve the validation errors above before execution."
   207	    exit 1
   208	fi
   209	
   210	# ── Infra test gate ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   211	# Block any phase that depends on infra_test (anything except infra_test itself)
   212	# unless all SP-T0x stories are completed.
   213	if [ "$PHASE" != "infra_test" ]; then
   214	    infra_test_stories=$(jq -r '
   215	        (.implementationOrder["infra_test"] // []) as $ids |
   216	        .stories[] | select(.id as $id | $ids | index($id))
   217	        | .id' "$PRD_FILE" 2>/dev/null)
   218	
   219	    if [ -n "$infra_test_stories" ]; then
   220	        infra_incomplete=""
   221	        while IFS= read -r sid; do
   222	            [ -z "$sid" ] && continue
   223	            completed=$(jq -r --arg id "$sid" '.stories[] | select(.id==$id) | .completed' "$PRD_FILE")
   224	            if [ "$completed" != "true" ]; then
   225	                infra_incomplete="$infra_incomplete $sid"
   226	            fi
   227	        done <<< "$infra_test_stories"
   228	
   229	        if [ -n "$infra_incomplete" ]; then
   230	            echo ""
   231	            echo -e "${RED}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
   232	            echo -e "${RED}║  INFRA TEST GATE — Phase '$PHASE' is BLOCKED         ║${NC}"
   233	            echo -e "${RED}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
   234	            echo ""
   235	            echo -e "${YELLOW}The following infra_test stories must complete before running '$PHASE':${NC}"
   236	            for sid in $infra_incomplete; do
   237	                title=$(jq -r --arg id "$sid" '.stories[] | select(.id==$id) | .title' "$PRD_FILE")
   238	                echo -e "  ${RED}✗${NC} $sid: $title"
   239	            done
   240	            echo ""
   241	            echo -e "${CYAN}Run the infra_test phase first:${NC}"
   242	            echo -e "  $(basename "$0") --phase infra_test"
   243	            echo ""
   244	            echo -e "${YELLOW}If infra_test has been run but status not updated, check:${NC}"
   245	            echo -e "  curl -s http://localhost:8090/api/stories | jq '[.[] | select(.phase==\"infra_test\") | {id,status,completed}]'"
   246	            echo ""
   247	            exit 1
   248	        fi
   249	    fi
   250	fi
   251	
   252	# Create log directory
   253	mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
   254	
   255	# ── Step 0.1: Contextual Purveyor Agent (CPA) pre-pass ───────────────────────
   256	# Reviews upcoming phase stories, adjusts estimates, and gates on confidence.
   257	# Skip with: SKIP_CPA=1 ./run-agent-orchestration.sh --phase <phase>
   258	# For strict mode (halt on 'review' gate): STRICT_CPA=1
   259	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   260	CPA_SCRIPT="$SCRIPT_DIR/contextualize-stories.sh"

   262	if [ "${SKIP_CPA:-0}" != "1" ] && [ -f "$CPA_SCRIPT" ]; then

   265	    cpa_flags="--phase $PHASE --apply"

   268	    cpa_exit=0

   272	    case $cpa_exit in
   273	        0)
   274	            success "Step 0.1: CPA gate PASSED for phase '$PHASE'"
   275	            "$SCRIPT_DIR/update-monitor.sh" event "cpa_pass" \
   276	                "CPA gate passed — all stories cleared" "" "main" "context-purveyor" 2>/dev/null || true
   277	            ;;
   278	        2)
   279	            warning "Step 0.1: CPA gate REVIEW — some stories have elevated risk"
   280	            warning "  Check: $LOG_DIR/cpa-${PHASE}.log"
   281	            warning "  Continuing (use STRICT_CPA=1 to halt on review gates)"
   282	            "$SCRIPT_DIR/update-monitor.sh" event "cpa_review" \
   283	                "CPA gate REVIEW — proceeding with warnings" "" "main" "context-purveyor" 2>/dev/null || true
   284	            ;;
   285	        3)
   286	            error "Step 0.1: CPA gate BLOCKED — one or more stories cannot proceed"
   287	            error "  Check: $LOG_DIR/cpa-${PHASE}.log"
   288	            error "  Resolve flagged issues, then re-run. Override: SKIP_CPA=1"

   297	else

   300	    else

   304	
   305	# Resolve orchestration mode for this phase (phase config > ORCH_MODE env > bash default)
   306	RESOLVED_ORCH_MODE=$(resolve_orch_mode "$PHASE")
   307	
   308	echo ""
   309	echo -e "${MAGENTA}============================================${NC}"
   310	echo -e "${MAGENTA}  EPAM CLI Agent Orchestration${NC}"

   314	echo -e "${MAGENTA}============================================${NC}"

   327	
   328	independent_stories=$(jq -r --arg phase "$PHASE" \

   332	
   333	review_stories=$(jq -r --arg phase "$PHASE" \

   337	
   338	# Display execution plan
   339	echo -e "${CYAN}Execution Plan:${NC}"
   340	echo ""
   341	if [ -n "$main_stories" ]; then
   342	    echo -e "  ${MAGENTA}Main branch (sequential):${NC}"
   343	    echo "$main_stories" | while read s; do
   344	        [ -z "$s" ] && continue
   345	        title=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .title' "$PRD_FILE")
   346	        role=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .agentRole // "none"' "$PRD_FILE")

   350	    done
   351	    echo ""
   352	fi
   353	if [ -n "$primary_stories" ]; then
   354	    echo -e "  ${GREEN}Worktree-1 (primary chain):${NC}"
   355	    echo "$primary_stories" | while read s; do
   356	        [ -z "$s" ] && continue
   357	        title=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .title' "$PRD_FILE")
   358	        role=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .agentRole // "none"' "$PRD_FILE")
   359	        runtime=$(resolve_story_runtime_fields "$s" "$PHASE")
   360	        IFS='|' read -r provider model model_source <<< "$runtime"
   361	        echo -e "    $s: $title ${GREEN}[$role | ${provider}/${model:-n/a} ${model_source:+via $model_source}]${NC}"
   362	    done
   363	    echo ""
   364	fi
   365	if [ -n "$independent_stories" ]; then
   366	    echo -e "  ${CYAN}Worktree-2 (independent):${NC}"
   367	    echo "$independent_stories" | while read s; do
   368	        [ -z "$s" ] && continue
   369	        title=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .title' "$PRD_FILE")
   370	        role=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .agentRole // "none"' "$PRD_FILE")
   371	        runtime=$(resolve_story_runtime_fields "$s" "$PHASE")
   372	        IFS='|' read -r provider model model_source <<< "$runtime"
   373	        echo -e "    $s: $title ${CYAN}[$role | ${provider}/${model:-n/a} ${model_source:+via $model_source}]${NC}"
   374	    done
   375	    echo ""
   376	fi
   377	if [ -n "$review_stories" ]; then
   378	    echo -e "  ${RED}Review (after worktrees complete):${NC}"
   379	    echo "$review_stories" | while read s; do
   380	        [ -z "$s" ] && continue
   381	        title=$(jq -r --arg id "$s" '.stories[] | select(.id == $id) | .title' "$PRD_FILE")
   382	        runtime=$(resolve_story_runtime_fields "$s" "$PHASE")
   383	        IFS='|' read -r provider model model_source <<< "$runtime"
   384	        echo -e "    $s: $title ${RED}[review-agent | ${provider}/${model:-n/a} ${model_source:+via $model_source}]${NC}"
   385	    done
   386	    echo ""
   387	fi
   388	
   389	if [ "$DRY_RUN" = true ]; then

   391	    exit 0
   392	fi

   394	# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   395	# Initialize monitor status file for HTML dashboard
   396	# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   397	log "Initializing monitor status file..."

   399	# Build initial stories map from phase

   405	      (.aiProvider // $phase_cfg.aiProvider // $runtime.provider // "epam") as $provider |
   406	      {key: .id, value: {status: (if .completed then "complete" else "pending" end), lane: .agentGroup, role: (.agentRole // ""), title: .title, updatedAt: null,

   408	      resolvedModel: (
   409	        if (.model // "") != "" then .model

   411	        elif (.effort // "medium") == "low" then "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"
   412	        elif (.effort // "medium") == "high" then "claude-opus-4-6"
   413	        else "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"
   414	        end
   415	      ),
   416	      resolvedModelSource: (
   417	        if (.model // "") != "" then "story"
   418	        elif $provider == "epam" and ($phase_cfg.defaultModel // "") != "" then "phase"
   419	        elif $provider == "epam" and ($runtime.defaultModel // "") != "" then "project"

   425	
   426	cat > "$MONITOR_STATUS_FILE" << JSONEOF

40	# Must pass before phase gate approval
    41	npx vitest run          # unit + integration tests
    42	npx tsc --noEmit        # TypeScript strict check
    43	```
    44	
    45	## Auth Model
    46	
    47	- **Free tier**: BYOK (bring your own key) — direct provider calls
    48	- **Pro/Enterprise**: Proxy through backend-stub — JWT claims carry tier info
    49	- **Device flow** (RFC 8628) is default auth; browser PKCE optional with `--browser`
    50	
    51	## KB-001 -- 2026-02-28
    52	
    53	**Category:** orchestration
    54	**AgentRole:** backend-engineer
    55	**Tags:** bash, orchestration, metadata-resolution, dashboards
    56	**Trigger:** first-success
    57	**StoryRef:** EPAM-026
    58	
    59	Apply phase/project default models only when the resolved provider is `epam`; if a legacy story explicitly uses `codex`, `opencode`, or another non-EPAM provider, falling through to `phasesConfig.defaultModel` makes orchestration-plan output and monitor payloads report the wrong model. For legacy providers, keep any explicit story model, otherwise derive a compatibility label from effort instead of EPAM defaults.

item.text:
Implemented EPAM-026 in the requested orchestration files.

The PRD now carries EPAM runtime defaults and story-level model metadata in [orchestrations/prd.json](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/prd.json#L1425) and [orchestrations/prd.json](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/prd.json#L1525), with `mvp_cli_control` getting a phase default model in [orchestrations/prd.json](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/prd.json#L1612). `EPAM-026` now resolves from the phase default, while `EPAM-027` uses a story override.

Runtime resolution and validation are centered in [claude.sh](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/scripts/claude.sh#L44): story model overrides beat phase defaults, which beat project defaults; EPAM stories fail fast on missing or invalid models; legacy non-EPAM stories keep a compatibility fallback so existing `codex`/`opencode` flows still work. Execution now persists `resolvedProvider`/`resolvedModel` into story metadata, emits them into monitor events, and writes `resolved_provider`/`resolved_model` into the phase-cost log at [claude.sh](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/scripts/claude.sh#L1093).

Estimator and orchestration output now display resolved runtime selection per story in [estimate-stories.sh](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/scripts/estimate-stories.sh#L574) and [run-agent-orchestration.sh](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/scripts/run-agent-orchestration.sh#L89), and the initial monitor payload includes the same resolved fields in [run-agent-orchestration.sh](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/scripts/run-agent-orchestration.sh#L399). I also added hidden validation/self-test entry points in [claude.sh](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/scripts/claude.sh#L1294) so precedence, validation failures, and log persistence are covered without adding test files outside scope.

Verified with `bash -n` on all three scripts, `orchestrations/scripts/claude.sh --self-test`, `orchestrations/scripts/estimate-stories.sh --phase mvp_cli_control --json`, and `orchestrations/scripts/run-agent-orchestration.sh --phase mvp_cli_control --dry-run`. I also appended the requested KB note in [orchestrations/agents/KB.md](/home/bjerome/projects/ai/epam-cli/orchestrations/agents/KB.md#L51).

items.text: Add PRD runtime model metadata and defaults in orchestrations/prd.json
Implement runtime provider/model resolution and validation in claude.sh
Update estimate/orchestration outputs and monitor payloads with resolved provider/model
Add and run scoped shell self-tests for precedence, validation, and cost-log payloads
